context-refill-cluster.title: Working context grew back near its earlier size after being reduced
context-refill-cluster.whatHappened: The session reduced its working context at least twice. Within five turns each time, the recorded working-context size grew back to at least 80% of its earlier high point.
context-refill-cluster.whyItMatters: Repeatedly returning to a large working context can make one session expensive and harder to steer.
context-refill-cluster.recommendation: Split unrelated tasks into separate sessions. After context is reduced, bring back only evidence needed for the current task.
context-refill-cluster.claimLimit: The trace does not prove that the refilled context was old, unnecessary, or unrelated to new work.
